channel.title: IBD LitMonitor - Pregnancy & Reproductive Health
channel.description: IBD literature monitoring: Pregnancy & Reproductive Health

item.title: Case Report: A rare adult case of ELANE-related severe congenital neutropenia revealed by neutropenic enterocolitis.
item.description: Frontiers in immunology - Case report - Severe congenital neutropenia (SCN) is a rare hematologic disorder characterized by recurrent and potentially life-threatening infections beginning in early childhood, associated with absolute neut...
